submission_role: Best fit if framed as medical genomics validation audit
fit_summary: Covers genomic research in relation to human health and disease, including neurogenomics, clinical genomics, and novel bioinformatics methods on medical data.
major_risk: May require a clearer medical-genomics contribution beyond public-data reanalysis.
current_source_note: Official scope includes functional genomics, neurogenomics, clinical genomics, and bioinformatics methods on medical data; BMC Series emphasizes scientific validity rather than perceived impact.
final_check_required: Confirm 2026 JCR/SCIE status, quartile, APC, word limits, and article type.

submission_role: Best fit if framed as data-mining validation and model-transportability audit
fit_summary: Covers AI, machine learning, visual analytics, and knowledge discovery from high-dimensional biological and biomedical data.
major_risk: May expect stronger computational or methodological novelty than a standard DEG validation paper.
current_source_note: Official scope includes application/evaluation of data mining and machine-learning algorithms, preprocessing, modeling, interpretation, and biological knowledge discovery.
final_check_required: Confirm 2026 JCR/SCIE status, quartile, APC, and whether external-validation failure studies are acceptable.

submission_role: Use only if manuscript emphasizes transcriptomics and validation standards
fit_summary: Covers genetics, genomics, transcriptomics and proteomics; BMC Series considers scientifically valid studies.
major_risk: Likely higher novelty bar for a public-data AD blood reanalysis; risk of editorial rejection if contribution is mostly confirmatory.
current_source_note: Official scope includes transcriptomics; BMC Series states manuscripts are judged by scientific validity, methodology, and standards.
final_check_required: Confirm 2026 JCR/SCIE status, quartile, APC, and fit with transcriptomic-methods section.

submission_role: Use if framed as a broad biomedical validation study with transparent negative findings
fit_summary: Broad medical open-access journal indexed in Web of Science/JCR according to Wolters Kluwer OA journal list.
major_risk: Scope is broad; pure bioinformatics papers may need strong clinical framing and transparent limitations.
current_source_note: Wolters Kluwer lists Medicine as fully open access, broad medical, and indexed in Web of Science / ISI Journal Citation Reports.
final_check_required: Confirm latest JCR quartile, article type, APC, and whether public-transcriptomics reanalysis is acceptable.

submission_role: Use only after confirming current publisher/indexing status
fit_summary: Scope includes genomics, bioinformatics, computational studies, and disease genetics.
major_risk: Publisher transition and indexing status require careful verification; not primary until confirmed.
current_source_note: Cambridge page notes the journal moved publisher after 2020 and describes scope including genomics, bioinformatics, and computational studies.
final_check_required: Confirm current active publisher, Web of Science/JCR inclusion, quartile, and manuscript handling status.

submission_role: Only if downgraded to short negative/validation note
fit_summary: Explicitly welcomes valid negative results and short research observations across clinical and scientific disciplines.
major_risk: May not satisfy SCI/Q3-Q4 target; use only as fallback if full article route fails.
current_source_note: Official scope welcomes valid negative results, scientific datasets, short reports, and observations.
final_check_required: Confirm whether it has current SCIE/JCR coverage; likely not primary SCI target.

submission_role: Do not submit unless wet-lab or molecular technique evidence is added
fit_summary: The project's pathway signal fits molecular biology topics, but the journal excludes purely bioinformatic / in silico papers.
major_risk: Current manuscript is entirely public-data bioinformatics without wet-lab validation.
current_source_note: Official scope says manuscripts need molecular/cell biology techniques and pure bioinformatic/in silico papers are not published.
final_check_required: Only reconsider if new experimental validation is added.
